REPLACE_NPC_ICONS.NAME: Replace NPC Item Icons
REPLACE_NPC_ICONS.HINT: Enable icon replacement for items owned by NPC actors.

REPLACE_ITEM_ICONS.NAME: Replace Item Icons
REPLACE_ITEM_ICONS.HINT: Enable icon replacement for world items and non-NPC owned items.
